title: ✅ Assignment 3A: Peer Review Letter – Compare & Contrast Essay
content:
✅ Assignment 3A: Peer Review Letter – Compare & Contrast Essay

Module: Week 4 | Rough Draft & Peer Review
Due Date: [Insert Date]
Points: 100 pts
Submission Type: Text box or file upload (DOCX or PDF)

⸻

📘 Purpose:

This assignment focuses on refining your writing by learning to give and receive helpful feedback. Peer review is not about being perfect—it’s about being specific, respectful, and supportive while helping each other improve before the final submission.

⸻

🔍 Before You Begin:
• Review this guide: MIT Communication Lab: Peer Review
• Make sure you’ve read your peer’s essay at least once in full before commenting.
• Remember: Your peer is depending on your review to revise their work—take your role seriously and give them something useful!

⸻

✍️ Instructions:
1. Read your assigned peer’s rough draft carefully.
2. Write a Peer Review Letter using the template provided below.
